description: A team of bank robbers that operated in Paris between 1981 and 1986, robbing around thirty banks. They wore false mustaches, beards, and wigs to disguise themselves. The gang was known for being respectful to hostages and gained public sympathy. Their total theft may have exceeded 30 million euros.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 5 August 1986 Bellaïche and Geay were arrested in Italy.
country_links.context: Members of the gang were arrested in Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: Robert Marguery, released in 1998, now lives in Thailand .
country_links.context: A former member of the gang now lives in Thailand.
